---
title: "Autonomous Flight Planning Workflow"
id: module-goals-fw
order: 90
summary: "Implement autonomous flight planning confidently and successfully, from software choice to safe execution."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
materials:
  - material-fw-7
  - material-fw-8
  - material-fw-6
activities:
  - activity-fw-14
  - activity-fw-11
  - activity-fw-111
  - activity-fw-12
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/module-goals-fw.md"
---

This module is intended to enable you to implement autonomous flight planning confidently and successfully. In particular:

- Overview of the hardware and software market, especially the planning and control software.
- Hardware-independent optimized planning of the flight area, taking air law and environmental protection into account with optimal safety and efficiency.
- Manual optimization of the flight plan and practice of the workflow.
- Safe execution of the flight task.

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
